name: Hubble Space Telescope
description: The telescope that changed how humanity sees the universe. Launched 1990 with a flawed mirror — corrected by Space Shuttle astronauts in 1993. Has since observed 1.4 million celestial objects. Operating 34+ years.
scale_fact: Hubble orbits 547 km up — just above the ISS. Low Earth Orbit is crammed with infrastructure we've completely forgotten about.
